_doc: Manual per-account overrides consumed by scripts/seed-from-preservation.mjs. Keyed by company name exactly as it appears in v1 prospects.company. Either provide {stage, type} for a single-deal override, or split_into_deals to create N deals on that account.

split_into_deals.name: Alliance — Claude Code Workshop
split_into_deals.notes: Workshop paid ($5k). Scheduled. Upcoming meeting with David Gallo — week of 2026-04-27. Will move to Delivery/Adoption after workshop is held.

split_into_deals.name: Alliance — Agent Build
split_into_deals.notes: Proposal for full agentic build has been sent. Alliance has not moved forward yet — they want to get a grip on Claude Code via the workshop first, then decide.

split_into_deals.name: Taurus — Claude Code Workshop
split_into_deals.notes: Workshop delivered. Team is now actively using Claude Code and becoming effective within their organization.

split_into_deals.name: Taurus — Agent Build
split_into_deals.notes: Customer-side discovery. Likely coming back once they identify highest-leverage pain points and biggest levers in their company.
